content:
Prerequisites: Knowledge (nature) 24 ranks, wild shape 6/day.
Benefit: The following magical beasts are added to the lists of animal companions from which you can select.
1st Level (no adjustment)
Stirge
Darkmantle
4th Level (-3)
Hippogriff
Shocker lizard
7th Level (-6)
Cockatrice
Ankheg
Griffon
Owlbear
Sea cat*
10th Level (-9)
Basilisk
Digerster
Girallon
Spider eater
13th Level (-12)
Bulette
Chimera
Remorhaz
16th Level (-15)
